headline: Petco Health & Wellness (WOOF) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Petco (WOOF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +150.00% and +0.66%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Casey's General Stores, Raises Price Target to $805
summary: UBS  analyst Mark Carden   maintains Casey's General Stores (NASDAQ:CASY) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $706 to $805.
